name: RuleTester reports a valid case as passing when the rule's detector exits 0 (no violation found)
command:
mkdir -p tests/my-rule/valid && printf 'function x() {}
' > tests/my-rule/valid/a.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" my-rule --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pass=1' out.txt && grep -q 'fail=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
